title: Bedrock weather
body:
### **_[REQUIRES POLYTONE](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone)_**

Bedrock's weather colors for java. It changes how the sky and fog looks when it rains from its darkened sky to a desaturated gray, aswell as changing the fog distance to match how it looks in bedrock.

There is also a fogless version, since the fog changes are impacted by mods that change the fog distance multipliers, such as sodium extras, which makes it appear extremely close if the distance start is edited. If you want to use it, you have to change the Fog Start option on it to 100%.
